pages.title: Pricing — Notavello
pages.description: Notavello is free to use. Export unlimited AI conversations as PDFs with a watermark. Remove the watermark for $5/month. Cancel anytime.

pages.title: Privacy Policy — Notavello
pages.description: Notavello privacy policy. Your conversations never leave your browser. We collect minimal data and never sell it.

pages.title: Export AI Conversations to PDF — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini & More | Notavello
pages.description: Turn your Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, Grok, or Perplexity conversations into clean, color-coded PDFs. Paste your chat, get a professionally formatted document instantly. Free to use.

pages.title: Free AI Writing Detector — Is This Text AI Generated? | Notavello
pages.description: Paste any text and instantly find out if it was written by AI. Notavello's free AI detector checks for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other AI writing patterns — no sign-up, no install.

pages.title: Ask My Screenshot — Turn Screenshots into Better AI Questions | Notavello
pages.description: Ask My Screenshot helps you turn screenshots into clear prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity. Your screenshot stays on your phone until you choose to attach it.

pages.title: Ask My Screenshot Privacy Policy — Notavello
pages.description: Ask My Screenshot privacy policy. Screenshots stay on your device unless you choose to attach or share them with a third-party AI service.

pages.title: Notavello Export ChatGPT to PDF — Chrome Extension | Notavello
pages.description: Export any ChatGPT conversation to a clean, searchable PDF in one click. A privacy-first Chrome extension with optional local auto-redaction and no copy-paste.

pages.title: Privacy Policy — Notavello Export ChatGPT to PDF | Notavello
pages.description: Privacy policy for the Notavello Export ChatGPT to PDF Chrome extension. Conversation exports are generated locally in your browser; no conversation content is uploaded, sold, shared, or collected.

pages.title: Desktop Filing View — Stop Digging Through Desktop Clutter | Notavello
pages.description: Desktop Filing View shows your real desktop folders as a flat, scannable list (or a color-coded grid), keeps loose files separated as Unfiled Items, and files them away with a drag and an undo — not a confirmation popup.

pages.title: AI Desktop Corral — Split-Screen Workspace for AI Work | Notavello
pages.description: AI Desktop Corral splits your screen between work and AI, then sends screenshots directly into ChatGPT, Claude, or Copilot with one keystroke. No snipping. No switching. No paste.

pages.title: AI Desktop Corral for Mac — Split-Screen Window Manager | Notavello
pages.description: AI Desktop Corral for Mac keeps your windows in two clean side-by-side zones. Drag a window to the edge and it snaps into place — one side for your AI assistant, one for your work.

pages.title: Privacy Policy — AI Desktop Corral | Notavello
pages.description: AI Desktop Corral collects no data. It makes no network connections, has no analytics or accounts, and keeps all settings on your own device.

pages.title: FolderCharm — Change Folder Colors & Add Badge Icons on Windows | Notavello
pages.description: FolderCharm is a simple Windows folder color changer and folder badge app. Customize folder icons on Windows 10 and 11 with colors, badges, and easy reset.

pages.title: FolderCharm Privacy Policy — Notavello
pages.description: FolderCharm privacy policy. FolderCharm customizes selected Windows folders locally and does not upload, sell, share, or track folder contents.

pages.title: Hide My Bookmarks — One-Click Bookmark Bar Privacy for Chrome | Notavello
pages.description: Hide My Bookmarks hides your entire bookmarks bar in one click, then restores it exactly as it was. No setup, no settings. Free Chrome extension.

pages.title: Privacy Policy — Hide My Bookmarks | Notavello
pages.description: Privacy policy for the Hide My Bookmarks Chrome extension. No data is collected, transmitted, or stored outside your own browser.
